mapper.select: SELECT a.user_id, a.user_number, a.user_phone, a.user_nike, a.gmv,a.integral, a.user_level_id as userLevelId, b.update_time as updateTime, b.nick, b.account_id, b.fans_count, b.region, b.status, b.create_time, b.id as memberAccountBindId, c.level_name as levelName, a.user_img FROM member a LEFT JOIN member_account_bind b ON a.user_id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN member_integral_level c ON a.user_level_id = c.level WHERE a.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT a.user_nike as userNike,a.user_img as userImg, a.user_id as userId,a.integral, a.mch_id as mchId, a.user_level_id as userLevelId,a.user_phone as userPhone, b.recertification_status as recertificationStatus,b.invite_code as inviteCode, c.level_name as levelName FROM member a LEFT JOIN member_account_bind b ON a.user_id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN member_integral_level c ON a.user_level_id = c.level WHERE a.user_id = #{memberId}
SELECT a.user_nike as userNike,a.user_img as userImg, a.user_id as userId FROM member a LEFT JOIN member_account_bind b ON a.user_id = b.user_id ORDER BY b.fans_count desc LIMIT 45

SELECT a.user_id as userId, a.user_level_id as userLevelId, b.sex,b.region, c.level_name as levelName FROM member a LEFT JOIN member_account_bind b ON a.user_id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN member_integral_level c ON a.user_level_id = c.level WHERE a.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT a.user_nike as userNike,a.user_img as userImg, a.user_level_id as userLevelId, b.level_name as userLevelName FROM member a LEFT JOIN member_integral_level b ON a.user_level_id = b.level ORDER BY a.integral desc LIMIT 10
SELECT a.user_nike as userNike, b.fans_count as fansCount FROM member a LEFT JOIN member_account_bind b ON a.user_id = b.user_id WHERE a.mch_id = #{mchId} ORDER BY b.fans_count desc LIMIT 10
SELECT count(*) FROM member a LEFT JOIN member_account_bind b ON a.user_id = b.user_id WHERE a.mch_id = #{mchId} AND b.sex = #{sex}
SELECT sum(gmv) FROM member WHERE mch_id = #{mchId}
SELECT sum(b.fans_count) FROM member a LEFT JOIN member_account_bind b ON a.user_id = b.user_id WHERE a.mch_id = #{mchId}

SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM member_task_apply WHERE user_id in (SELECT user_id FROM member WHERE mch_id = #{mchId})) a LEFT JOIN member b ON a.user_id = b.user_id WHERE b.mch_id = #{mchId} AND a.video is not null
SELECT mta.video,mta.weight FROM member_task_apply mta LEFT JOIN member b ON mta.user_id = b.user_id WHERE mta.video IS NOT NULL AND b.mch_id = #{mchId} ORDER BY mta.weight ASC,mta.create_time DESC
